scripts.validate:all: node build/validate.mjs --emit-findings && node build/validate-facts.mjs && node build/validate-cross-references.mjs && node build/validate-content-health.mjs && node build/validate-relations.mjs && node build/validate-adj-coverage.mjs && node build/validate-search.mjs && node build/validate-formatting.mjs
scripts.check: node build/check.mjs --emit-findings && node build/validate-facts.mjs && node build/validate-cross-references.mjs && node build/validate-formatting.mjs && node build/test-admin.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run validate && npm run build && npm run check
